Title: Frontex continuing mission in Greece despite serious violations of migrants' rights
Description: How long will Frontex tolerate the growing violations of migrants' rights in Greece? A Le Monde investigation documents the many warnings issued by the Fundamental Rights Office of the European agency, which have so far failed to prompt meaningful action.

Elie Barnavi: 'Marwan Barghouti is the only one capable of uniting the Palestinian people around a national project and the two-state solution'
Description: The former Israeli ambassador to France, in an op-ed for Le Monde, calls for the release of the Palestinian politician, who has been held in Israel since 2002. He argues that Barghouti has consistently championed the project of a sovereign Palestine living in peace alongside Israel.

Title: In Argentina, a thriving theater scene
Description: Buenos Aires has emerged as the epicenter of Spanish-language theater, where a vibrant creative scene – both precarious and remarkably prolific – is defined by the generosity of its performances.

Title: BTS, the South Korean group that propelled K-pop to the top of the global music industry
Description: As the seven artists perform on July 17 and 18 at the Stade de France, we look back at their beginnings in 2013 and their unprecedented rise.

Title: 'It still feels a bit unreal': Lovers of Fontainebleau forest 'deeply saddened' by devastating fire
Description: Naturalists, hikers, and other lovers of the most famous woods in the Paris region are the loss of rich ecosystems and wonder about the future of an area that has long been popular.

19 men charged in mass rapes case among 'libertines' in France
Description: A man identified as Christophe B. is accused of having forced six former partners into extremely violent sexual encounters with dozens of men recruited online over a period of more than 20 years, under the guise of 'libertinism.'

Title: The troubling Russian connections of a 'European' password manager
Description: Although it presents itself as a Spanish company, Passwork was actually developed in Russia and operates with a license from Russia's FSB domestic intelligence agency. The situation raises major security questions for its customers, including several French companies.

Title: Visualize the full extent of wildfires across Europe in recent weeks
Description: The burned areas across the European continent have already far surpassed levels seen in recent years and are now approaching the maximum recorded in 2025.
